src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Generated with jakarta.annotation.Generated to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer JHipster versions.
Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer Spring Boot versions.
Remove the deprecated @EnableZuulProxy annotation as Zuul 1.x is no longer supported in modern Spring Cloud Gateway setups.
Replace JPA repository and auditing annotations with R2DBC equivalents to switch from synchronous to reactive database access.
Add custom converters to handle UUID serialization and deserialization for R2DBC.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public enum UUIDToStringConverter implements Converter<UUID, String>

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add custom converters to handle Instant serialization and deserialization via LocalDateTime for R2DBC compatibility.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public enum InstantWriteConverter implements Converter<Instant, LocalDateTime>

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add custom converters to handle Duration serialization and deserialization via Long for R2DBC compatibility.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public enum DurationWriteConverter implements Converter<Duration, Long>

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add custom converters to handle ZonedDateTime serialization and deserialization via LocalDateTime for R2DBC compatibility.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public enum ZonedDateTimeReadConverter implements Converter<LocalDateTime, ZonedDateTime>

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add custom converter to handle BitSet deserialization to Boolean for R2DBC compatibility.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public enum BitSetReadConverter implements Converter<BitSet, Boolean>

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Register the custom type converters with the R2DBC infrastructure.
Configure the R2DBC dialect bean to resolve database-specific behaviors.
Configure the UpdateMapper bean required for R2DBC repository operations.
Configure the SqlRenderer bean for generating SQL queries in R2DBC.
Replace the servlet-based WebMvcConfigurer with the reactive WebFluxConfigurer to align with a WebFlux stack.
Update the Liquibase bean configuration to use the newer setLabelFilter API instead of the deprecated setLabels method.
Replace Spring MVC WebMvcConfigurer and LocaleResolver with WebFlux WebFilter and LocaleContextResolver to support reactive stack.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: implements WebMvcConfigurer -> implements LocaleContextResolver; LocaleResolver -> WebFilter

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update imports to use jakarta.annotation and Spring WebFlux classes instead of javax and Spring MVC classes.
Implement custom AngularCookieLocaleContextResolver to handle locale resolution in a reactive environment using ServerWebExchange.
Implement a WebFilter to intercept requests and change the locale context based on query parameters.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public WebFilter localeChangeFilter(LocaleContextResolver localeContextResolver) { return (exchange, chain) -> { ... }; }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace Spring Security MVC configuration (WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter) with WebFlux reactive configuration (SecurityWebFilterChain) to align with the reactive stack.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed class to implement SecurityWebFilterChain bean instead of extending WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update security enable annotations from MVC-based to Reactive-based equivalents.
Introduce a ReactiveAuthenticationManager bean to handle authentication in the reactive pipeline.
Rewrite HTTP security configuration using ServerHttpSecurity DSL instead of HttpSecurity.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced configure(HttpSecurity) with springSecurityFilterChain(ServerHttpSecurity) using lambda DSL.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace antMatchers with pathMatchers for reactive web exchange matching.
Switch header writers to their reactive counterparts.
